div1.entryFree:
Client, 1) one who applies to a lawyer or counsellor for advice in a question of law: Ven. 336. Lucr. 1020. Meas. I, 2, 110. Used adjectively: windy attorneys to their c. woes, R3 IV, 4, 127 (Ff. clients).
2) customer: when she should do for --s her fitment, she has me her quirks, Per. IV, 6, 6 (the bawd's speech).
